# Model: haiku
# Duration: 8.4s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Erica! Welcome to Shiftsmart. I'm your personal concierge here to help you get started! Your first step is to complete your orientation in the app and you get paid $10 when you finish it! Reply HELP if you have any questions
Partner: Help
Concierge: No problem! To start your orientation, open the Shiftsmart app and stay on the Home tab. Look for the white card with the blue "Required to unlock shifts" banner — it's titled "In-app orientation" and shows $10.00. Tap Get started then Start learning modules.
Partner: I don't see that

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
What do you see on your Home screen right now? That'll help me point you to the right spot.
